PostToolUse.name: Remotion Render Audio Check
PostToolUse.description: After rendering a video, remind to validate audio duration

hooks.prompt: [remotion] Render complete! Validate audio sync: run measure_audio.py on your narration MP3 with --fps matching your composition FPS. Compare duration_frames_with_padding against your composition's durationInFrames.

PostToolUse.name: Continuous Audio Pattern Reminder
PostToolUse.description: When writing React components, remind about the continuous audio pattern to prevent voice cutting

hooks.prompt: [remotion] TSX file modified. Remember: <Audio> must be at the ROOT <AbsoluteFill> level, NOT inside <Sequence>. Audio inside Sequence will CUT between slides. Use ONE continuous narration.mp3 at the root.

PostToolUse.name: Voice Generation Follow-up
PostToolUse.description: After voice generation, suggest measuring duration for frame calculations

hooks.prompt: [remotion] Voice generated! Run measure_audio.py on the output MP3 with --fps 30 to get exact frame counts for your composition's durationInFrames.

PostToolUse.name: Audio Concat Segment Mapping
PostToolUse.description: After concatenating audio, remind to map segment timestamps to Sequences

hooks.prompt: [remotion] Audio concatenated! Use the 'segments' array from the JSON output to set each <Sequence from={start_frame} durationInFrames={duration_frames}>. Use 'total_frames_with_padding' for the composition's durationInFrames.

PostToolUse.name: Timeline JSON Validation
PostToolUse.description: After modifying timeline data, remind to validate against actual audio durations

hooks.prompt: [remotion] Timeline JSON modified. Validate that totalDurationMs and scene startMs/endMs values match actual audio durations. Run measure_audio.py --dir public/audio/ to verify.
